prevention.body: Falls are the leading cause of injury in adults over 65 — and most happen at home. The right adaptations take less than a day to install and can change everything.

cards.title: Home Assessment
cards.desc: Upload photos of any room. We identify every hazard and give you a personalised cost estimate — free, with no commitment.

cards.title: Professional Installation
cards.desc: Certified experts adapt your entire home in a single visit — grab bars, non-slip flooring, wider doorways, lighting, and more.

cards.title: Smart Home Technology
cards.desc: Voice controls, smart locks, fall detection, and 24/7 emergency alerts — all installed and working from day one.

cards.title: Grant Management
cards.desc: We file everything with Plan Adapta on your behalf. Grants cover up to 90% of costs. You just sign.

health.title: Health & Vitals Monitoring
health.desc: Blood pressure, heart rate, medication reminders, family alerts. Peace of mind wherever you are.

gallery.badge: What a safer home looks like
gallery.title: See the difference we make.

items.title: Bathroom Safety
items.desc: Grab bars, non-slip surfaces, accessible shower, raised toilet seat.

items.title: Safety Adaptations
items.desc: Handrails, stair treads, motion lighting, fall detection sensors.

items.title: Smart Technology
items.desc: Voice controls, vitals monitoring, emergency call, family alerts.

plans.sub: Free home assessment + grant filing included in every plan

items.name: Essential
items.desc: Entry, living room & stairway. The essential safety upgrades.

items.name: Advanced
items.desc: Every room adapted, smart access & emergency systems.

items.name: Premium

grants.title: The government pays up to 90%.
grants.sub: We file everything. You sign once.
grants.body: Plan Adapta grants cover up to €6,000 for accessibility works. CasaMia manages your complete application — no charge, no hassle.

eurosafe.desc: Committed to reducing home accidents and improving senior safety across Europe.

footer.tagline: Helping families across Europe age gracefully at home.

estimator.errorBody: We couldn't analyse your photos. Please try again or call us on +34 900 000 000.
estimator.noFiles: Please add at least one photo of your home first.
estimator.noKey: Add VITE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to your environment to enable live photo analysis.

workflow.title: Send photos. Get a safer-home plan.

photos.title: Upload the rooms that worry you.
photos.body: Add up to 8 photos. Wide room shots are best: bathroom, stairs, entrance, kitchen, bedroom, and main walking routes.
photos.rules: JPG, PNG or WebP. Up to 8 photos, 8MB each.
photos.empty: No photos selected yet. Add at least one photo to continue.
photos.descriptionPlaceholder: Example: my mother uses a walker, the bathroom floor is slippery, the stairs have poor lighting...

home.title: Tell us where and what to check.
home.body: The postcode and home context help CasaMia prepare the right plan and later verify possible regional grant options.
home.regionalNote: Grant support in Spain depends on regional calls, documentation, and the final adaptation scope.

contact.title: Where should we send the estimate?
contact.body: CasaMia captures this before analysis so the report can be delivered and followed up properly.
contact.name: Name
contact.emailDeliveryBody: Best for the complete estimate and secure report link.
contact.whatsappDeliveryBody: Short message only. Sensitive details stay on the report page.
contact.consent: I agree CasaMia can process my home photos, safety information, and contact details to prepare and send my estimate.

result.loadingBody: We are creating the lead, reviewing the home context, and preparing the report link.
result.title: Your home safety estimate
result.emailQueued: The full report is ready to send by email.
result.whatsappQueued: The WhatsApp message will contain only a secure report link.
result.demoMode: Demo mode: this report is saved locally until the Supabase/email/WhatsApp backend is connected.

errors.heic: HEIC photos are not supported yet. Please upload JPG, PNG or WebP.
errors.unsupported: {{file}} is not a supported image type.
errors.maxPhotos: You can upload up to {{count}} photos.
errors.submit: We could not create the estimate. The lead details are still safe in the form; please try again.

report.title: Your CasaMia safety report.
report.intro: This secure report summarises the estimate without exposing private photo URLs.
report.notFoundBody: This link may have expired or the report may only exist on the original device in demo mode.
report.privateBody: Photo files remain private. This page only shows the safety findings and estimate summary.

howItWorks.title: A safer home in three clear steps.
howItWorks.intro: CasaMia keeps the process simple: upload photos, receive a tailored plan, and let certified installers handle the adaptations.

steps.title: Upload your home photos
steps.desc: Send photos of bathrooms, kitchens, stairs, bedrooms, entrances, and living spaces. We look for hazards that commonly cause falls or emergency delays.

steps.title: Receive your estimate
steps.desc: The estimator identifies risks, recommends the right plan, and shows the likely cost before and after available grants.

steps.title: Install and file grants
steps.desc: Our team installs the agreed adaptations and manages Plan Adapta paperwork so your family does not have to chase forms.

plans.title: Compare every CasaMia plan.
plans.intro: Each plan includes assessment and grant filing. Choose the level of adaptation that matches the home and the family support needed.

grants.title: Grant support without the paperwork maze.
grants.intro: Plan Adapta can cover a significant part of accessibility works. CasaMia prepares, files, and follows up on the application for you.
eligibility: The home is in Spain and needs accessibility or safety improvements.
The resident is over 65, has mobility needs, or has a recognised disability.
The work improves daily safety: bathrooms, stairs, access, doors, lighting, or emergency systems.
process: Collecting the required home and resident details.
Filing with the relevant grant channel and tracking progress.

contact.title: Talk to CasaMia.
contact.intro: Tell us about the home and we will help you choose the safest next step.

fields.name: Name
fields.plan: Which plan are you interested in?

contact.success: Thank you. CasaMia will follow up shortly.
